content.problemStatement:
There are NNN bags and NNN magic cards which manufactured by DSUDSUDSU CompanyCompanyCompany
daily. Each bag and card has assigned a number between 111 to NNN. Initially ithi^{th}ith card
is in the ithi^{th}ith bag. Now manager wants to club some card together.

Manager is really busy right now he needs your help to perform this task.

You have QQQ queries to perform.

Each query can be among 333 TypesTypesTypes :


TypeTypeType-111. QueryQueryQuery - 111 AAA BBB
Magic card with number AAA and BBB are merge into single bag if they belong to two
different bags. Its independent which bag to choose, our goal is to add both the cards with number AAA and BBB in the same bag.

NOTENOTENOTE - If you merging two magic cards AAA and BBB together then all other card which are already merge with card AAA and BBB will all be in a single bag after this query.


TypeTypeType-222. QueryQueryQuery - 222 AAA BBB
You need to check if two magic cards with number AAA and BBB belongs to same bag
or not.


TypeTypeType-333. QueryQueryQuery - 333
This query use to check how many distinct bags remained till now.


Input Format

The first line contains two space separated integer NNN and QQQ.
Next QQQ line contains 333 space separated integer for TypeTypeType-111 and TypeTypeType-222 query
and single integer for TypeTypeType-333 query as shown in problem description.


Output Format

For TypeTypeType-222 query print **"YES"** if both magic cards belong to same bag else print **"NO"** without quotes.
For TypeTypeType-333 query print a single integer that denotes number of bags remained till now.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
1st1^{st}1st query will give ans NONONO as card with number 1 and 2 belong to different bags.
2nd2^{nd}2nd query will check no of distinct bags which are 333 as we did not perform any merge yet.
3rd3^{rd}3rd query will perform merge of two cards with number 1 and 2 into one bag.
4th4^{th}4th query will check no of distinct bags which are 222 now.
5th5^{th}5th query will give ans YESYESYES as card with number 1 and 2 belong to same bags.
6th6^{th}6th query will perform merge of two cards with number 2 and 3 into one bag.
7th7^{th}7th query will check no of distinct bags which is 111. (All magic cards is in the same bag).
8th8^{th}8th query will give ans YESYESYES as card with number 1 and 3 belong to same bag.
